title: Kizaru Lands on Egghead
description: On pages 4–6, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #6, Kizaru as The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.
scene: The Egghead Incident accelerates as the Marines surround the island, York’s betrayal surfaces, the Straw Hats regroup, Kizaru arrives, and Saturn approaches.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Seems like you still got blood flowing inside you...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can howl all you want but Kuma's mind won't ever come back.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Liar! There's no way he would vol- utter to that!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: that he would leave me behind!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me he gave you the slip! And you call yourself a fleet ad- Miral?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: who has lost everything, including your will and your mind...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So, where are you headed off to?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: destroy all the sea beast weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've arrived at the Fabriophase! OCCUPY the island!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Has broken through the labophase located above the clouds!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Siege Begins through 22 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
